title: iochroma amicorum
intro: Iochroma amicorum, also known as the "Friendship Plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of South America and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to promote digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function.
